name: EverShop Node.js E-Commerce API
what_it_does: Open-source Node.js e-commerce platform with GraphQL API — enabling JavaScript developers to build headless e-commerce storefronts with React, manage products, orders, and customers, with a GraphQL API for data operations, PostgreSQL backend, extension architecture, and a modern developer experience for teams building custom online stores.
use_cases: Managing EverShop products and categories via GraphQL API for catalog automation
Processing EverShop orders via GraphQL for order management workflow integration
Building headless EverShop storefronts via GraphQL API for custom React frontends
Managing EverShop customers via API for CRM integration
Extending EverShop with custom modules via API for specialized e-commerce workflows
not_for: Teams without Node.js/React expertise (EverShop is JavaScript-native)
Non-technical merchants needing hosted SaaS (use Shopify or BigCommerce)
Enterprise e-commerce requiring extensive third-party integrations (EverShop ecosystem is small)
best_when: A JavaScript development team needs an open-source, Node.js-native headless e-commerce platform — where the GraphQL API, React storefront, and modern JS tooling match the team's existing stack.
avoid_when: You need extensive integrations, PHP/Ruby/Python ecosystem, managed SaaS, or a large plugin marketplace.

auth.notes: GraphQL-only API (no REST). Bearer token auth from login mutation. Admin token for management operations. Customer session token for storefront. No OAuth2. No webhooks in core. Self-hosted — user controls auth. PostgreSQL backend. Node.js/Express framework. No fine-grained API scopes.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free and open source (GPL v3)
pricing.paid_tiers: EverShop Cloud (managed) pricing coming; extensions available
pricing.notes: Open source project. Created by Tung Nguyen (Vietnamese). GPL v3 license. GitHub: evershopcommerce/evershop (3,500+ stars). Node.js + React + PostgreSQL. Modern JS tooling (Vite, React hooks). Extension architecture. Relatively new (2022). Growing JS community. Vietnamese founder — growing APAC presence. GraphQL-first API design. Used by developers building custom stores.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: GraphQL only — no REST API. Bearer token auth. No webhooks. Node.js/React expertise required. Self-hosted. Open source. Newer platform (2022) — less mature ecosystem. GPL v3. Small community vs established e-commerce platforms.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Product reads fully idempotent by ID/SKU. Order reads idempotent. GraphQL queries idempotent. Mutations require custom idempotency.
known_agent_gotchas: GraphQL only — no REST API; requires GraphQL client
No webhooks in core — requires custom extension
Newer platform (2022) — smaller ecosystem and less documentation
GPL v3 license — consider license implications for commercial use
Self-hosted — agents need network access to EverShop server

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS depends on server config. User-controlled data residency. Bearer token auth. No OAuth2. Open source GPL — auditable. Node.js security model. Self-hosted — user responsible for server hardening. No compliance certifications. PCI-DSS compliance requires additional payment security work.
